title: CrazyZombie
description: This is a Minecraft 1.21 fabric mod. The main enhancement of the original zombies is to make zombies spawn in both the Overworld and the Nether Zombies no longer burn during the day, can swim in water, can place and destroy blocks to chase.
body: This is a Minecraft 1.21 fabric mod. The main enhancement of the original zombies is to make zombies spawn in both the Overworld and the Nether Zombies no longer burn during the day, can swim in water, can place and destroy blocks to chase.
